title: Add ZcashClient import
description: Import the generated ZcashClient at the top of your main module.
beforeCode:
from bitcoin.rpc import RawProxy
proxy = RawProxy(port=18332)
afterCode:
from zcash_rpc import ZcashClient
client = ZcashClient(zebra_port=8232, zkool_port=8000)
# account_id = client.wallet.create_account("main", seed, pools=7)
notes: This replaces the Bitcoin RPC connection with ZcashClient (zebrad + zkool).

title: Configure Zcash node connection
description: Set zebrad and zkool connection details.
afterCode:
ZEBRA_HOST=127.0.0.1
ZEBRA_PORT=8232
ZKOOL_HOST=127.0.0.1
ZKOOL_PORT=8000
notes: Adjust host/port if your nodes are remote. zebrad = chain data, zkool = wallet operations.

title: getnewaddress → z_getnewaddress
description: Pass 'sapling' for shielded address. Returns zs... prefix.
afterCode:
# Unified address (Orchard + Sapling + Transparent)
addrs = client.wallet.get_addresses(account_id, pools=6)
unified_addr = addrs["ua"]  # u1... (auto-selects best pool)
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.

title: getblock → getblock
description: Same RPC — works identically.
afterCode:
# Same RPC — works on zebrad identically
block = client.chain.getblock(hash_or_height, verbosity=1)
notes: Compatible — works the same on zebrad. No changes required.

title: getrawtransaction → getrawtransaction
description: Same RPC — but shielded outputs are encrypted.
afterCode:
# Same RPC — shielded outputs are encrypted
tx = client.chain.getrawtransaction(txid, verbose=1)
notes: Compatible — works the same on zebrad. No changes required.

title: sendrawtransaction → sendrawtransaction
description: Same RPC — for transparent transactions.
afterCode:
# Same RPC — for transparent transactions
# For shielded sends, use client.wallet.send() instead
txid = client.chain.sendrawtransaction(hex_data)
notes: Compatible — works the same on zebrad. No changes required.

title: getblockchaininfo → getblockchaininfo
description: Same RPC — works identically on Zcash.
afterCode:
# Same RPC — works on zebrad identically
info = client.chain.getblockchaininfo()
notes: Compatible — works the same on zebrad. No changes required.

title: getblock → getblock
description: Same RPC — works identically.
afterCode:
# Same RPC — works on zebrad identically
block = client.chain.getblock(hash_or_height, verbosity=1)
notes: Compatible — works the same on zebrad. No changes required.

title: listunspent → z_listunspent
description: Lists shielded notes. Different schema from transparent listunspent.
beforeCode: # Give the private key to zcashd (for ismine, listunspent, etc).
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.

title: importprivkey → z_importkey
description: Imports shielded spending key. Triggers rescan.
afterCode:
# Import shielded spending key (triggers rescan)
client.chain.z_importkey(key, rescan="yes")
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.

title: dumpprivkey → z_exportkey

key = client.chain.z_exportkey(zaddr)
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.

title: getbalance → z_gettotalbalance
description: Returns {transparent, private, total}. Use 'private' for shielded balance.
notes: This call changes behavior — uses shielded pool with zk-SNARK proofs.
